title: What caused this React app to crash?
summary: Google for Developers presents a CI pipeline debugging puzzle where a React app crashes after upgrading from React 18 to React 19. The build runs faster than expected and the production failure is traced to a cache configuration issue, highlighting a real-world build-system pattern.
writeup: This video walks through a CI pipeline debugging puzzle in which a React app crashes in production after an upgrade from React 18 to React 19. The investigation notes that the build runs faster than expected and traces the production failure to a cache configuration issue rather than the version bump itself. The takeaway is a real-world build-system pattern: a misconfigured cache can mask problems and surface as a crash only after deployment.
